sections.paragraph:
μωραίνω [μωρός]

—1. cause/show to be foolish 1 Cor 1:20; pass. in act. sense become foolish Ro 1:22. It is a short step to

—2. make tasteless, pass. in act. sense become insipid/tasteless (i.e. there is no transmission of discernible flavor: the salt has nothing to ‘say’) Mt 5:13; Lk 14:34.
